message:
test(frankenterm-core): finish recorder migration import + helper cleanup

Completes the mock→real migration of recorder_migration_labruntime.rs
by swapping the leftover mock-side imports for the real-storage
imports and replacing the MockMigrationStorage scaffolding with the
shared AppendLogStorageFixture helper.

The previous commit (63494b78b) ported the 26 test bodies to use the
real append-log storage, but had to leave the import block and the
MockMigrationStorage struct in place because parallel work in the
same file made it impossible to land the cleanup atomically. This
commit removes the now-unused mock scaffolding so the file reads
cleanly.

Imports dropped (no longer referenced after the test body migration):

- AppendResponse              — captured by the mock; not used by real
- CheckpointCommitOutcome     — hand-rolled HashMap stand-in
- FlushMode, FlushStats       — exposed by the mock for inspection
- RecorderConsumerLag         — make_consumer_lag mock helper input
- RecorderStorageError        — only the mock raised this directly
- RecorderStorageHealth       — mock health stub
- RecorderStorageLag          — mock lag stub

Imports added:

- AppendLogRecorderStorage    — real storage backend
- AppendLogStorageConfig      — config shape for the fixture builder
- tempfile::{TempDir, tempdir}— real-disk lifecycle
- std::fs::File, io::Read, path::PathBuf — for read_append_log_records

Other cleanup:

- The "Test helpers: mock reader + mock storage" section header is
  renamed to "Test helpers: event reader + real append-log storage
  fixture" to match what actually lives there.
- MockMigrationStorage / MockMigrationStorage::healthy /
  make_consumer_lag drop entirely; AppendLogStorageFixture takes over
  as the per-test fixture builder, with a `with_config(|cfg| ...)`
  callback for tests that need to tweak append-log defaults.

This is the natural follow-up to 63494b78b — same migration, finished.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
